candidates.row_label: Depreciation and write-down of equipment and non-current assets
candidates.why: Separate operating D&A-style line, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and appears alongside broader operating expense lines rather than within the selected COGS row 'Merchandise'. Conservatively do not assign it to COGS.
Generic amortization label with no indication it belongs to COGS; also appears as a header/blank row in places, so not suitable for separate COGS D&A addition.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Explicit amortization line, but wording points to intangible/marketing-related overhead rather than merchandise/COGS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly belongs to SG&A/R&D, not COGS.
Generic depreciation line with no COGS indication; likely part of broader operating overhead disclosures, not merchandise.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Merchandise'. No explicit COGS-specific D&A row is shown. Visible D&A rows appear as separate operating expense lines or SG&A/R&D-related disclosures rather than costs attached to merchandise. To avoid unsupported allocation and double counting, do not add any COGS_DA row separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and write-down of equipment and non-current assets
candidates.why: This is the clearest separate same-level operating D&A summary line above operating loss. Relative to selected XSGA rows ('Personnel costs', 'Other expenses', 'Capitalised development expenditure'), it appears outside/alongside them rather than nested within them, so it should be added separately. Preferred over granular component rows to avoid double counting.
Generic amortization rows appear as headers/blank or duplicated labels and are less reliable than the explicit summary line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Granular amortization component likely covered by the broader separate D&A summary row; do not use if summary is chosen.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A/R&D amortization component, but granular. Since a broader separate D&A summary row exists, prefer the summary to avoid double counting. Also the selected XRD row already handles 'Capitalised development expenditure', so adding this component separately is unnecessary unless no summary existed.
Granular component and less comprehensive than the separate D&A summary row.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation and write-down of equipment and non-current assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is the combination of 'Personnel costs', 'Other expenses', and 'Capitalised development expenditure'. The D&A line 'Depreciation and write-down of equipment and non-current assets' appears as a separate operating line at the same level, before total operating expenses, so it should be added separately later. Granular amortization/depreciation rows are not selected because the summary-vs-components rule favors the broader summary row and avoids double counting.
